alkylation reagent: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide for 20 min in the dark at room temperature
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide for 20 min in the dark at room temperature
cleavage agent: digested using 13 ng μL−1 trypsin (Thermo Fisher Scientific) overnight at 37 °C
fractionation method: digested peptides were fractionated using SCX-Stage-Tips.
fragmentation method: the fragments were produced using collision-induced dissociation (CID)
instrument: performed on an LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer
labeling: SILAC cross-linking mass spectrometry to determine interactions within lamin dimers
